emails.subject: Re: PSERC Industrial Advisory Board Meeting Invitation
emails.subject_base: PSERC Industrial Advisory Board Meeting Invitation
emails.body: Vince, I agree with Alex on this issue. As an alternative for sponsorship. The UT electrical engineering dept. is interested in sponsorship for research activities such as the one I just completed or as Martin performed when he was at UT (just thought that I would mention this as a possible alternative). Would you be interested in a presentation or a "brown bag lunch" on this subject? Lance Alex Huang 04/02/2001 08:55 AM
